items.label: Overview
items.content: Simple event system used across the ZYNQ SDK for reactive communication.

items.label: API
Overview
items.content: ZYNQPeer is a WebRTC wrapper powered by PeerJS with auto-reconnect, media + data support and event-driven architecture.

items.label: Constructor
items.content:
### Type

```ts
new ZYNQ.Peer(options?: PeerOptions)
```

### PeerOptions

```ts
type PeerOptions = {
  video?: boolean
  audio?: boolean
  txt?: boolean
  id?: string
  rateLimit?: number
  autoReconnect?: boolean
  maxReconnectAttempts?: number
}
```

### Example

```ts
const peer = new ZYNQ.Peer({
  video: true,
  audio: true,
  autoReconnect: true
});
```

items.label: Methods
Events
Overview
items.content: ZYNQGames manages a full game library with filtering, sorting, favorites, history and device compatibility detection.

items.label: Types
items.content:
### Game Object

```ts
type Game = {
  name: string
  category?: string
  alias: string
  url: string
  thumb: string
  devices: number[]
  playCount?: number
}
```

items.label: Methods
items.content:
### Core API

```ts
init(options?): Promise<this>
search(query: string): this
reset(): this
sortBy(field: string): this
sortByPopularity(): this
```

### Filtering

```ts
getByAlias(alias: string): Game | null
getByCategory(category: string): this
filterSupported(): this
filterFavorites(): this
```

### Randomization

```ts
random(n?: number): this
getRandomOne(): Game
shuffle(): this
```

### Favorites & History

```ts
toggleFavorite(alias: string): this
isFavorite(alias: string): boolean
addToHistory(alias: string): this
getHistory(): Game[]
clearHistory(): this
```

### Example

```ts
const games = new ZYNQ.games;

await games.init();

games
  .search('minecraft')
  .filterSupported()
  .sortByPopularity();

console.log(games.list);
```

items.label: Getters
items.content:
### Properties

```ts
games.list: Game[]
games.total: number
games.filteredCount: number
```

items.label: Exports
items.content:
### Global SDK Object

```ts
window.ZYNQ = {
  games,
  Peer,
  EventEmitter
}
```

### ES Modules

```ts
import ZYNQ, { games, Peer, EventEmitter } from 'zynq-sdk'
```
